title: Responsible Humanoids: A Contradiction in Terms?
summary: The current generation of humanoid robots, while technically impressive, is not design with the human at the centre.

title: Integrating Face Generation on a (ROS) Robot
summary: In this presentation, I cover how to architecture a ROS robot to nicely interact procedural face generation with the other robot capabilities

title: End-to-end co-design and Responsible Robotics
summary: An overview of my work on machine learning for lifelong co-design and its impact for a responsible robotics roadmap

title: Understandability: Some food for thought in the context of HRI
summary: I explain the idea of 'understandability' from the point-of-view of human-robot interaction

title: ROS for Human-Robot Interaction: Introduction to the new REP-155
summary: An overview of the ROS4HRI standard
